div1.entryFree:
Tongueless, 1) having no tongue, speechless, silent: the t. caverns of the earth, R2 I, 1, 105. our grave . . . shall have a t. mouth, not worshipped with a waxen epitaph, H5 I, 2, 232. what t. blocks were they! would they not speak? R3 III, 7, 42.
2) not mentioned, not spoken of: one good deed dying t. slaughters a thousand, Wint. I, 2, 92.
